據英國媒體《太陽報》消息，曼聯球星拉舒福特（Marcus Rashford）近日買了個高爾夫球場，準備自己設計建設一座新房子。更好的保護隱私，享受寧靜的生活。

拉舒福特目前住在柴郡一座價值185萬鎊的房裡，不過如今他覺得需要買個新房來保護隱私。知情人透露：「拉舒福特明白作為一名足球運動員的一部分就是成為一個公眾人物，他想利用他的身份來傳遞一種積極的力量。但同時，在場外，他也想享受寧靜的生活。他認為建造一所四周綠樹環繞的新房子將給他提供一個逃離外界的空間。」

拉舒福特今季場上場下都非常出彩，在受傷休戰了一段時間的情況下，拉舒福特依然入球數超過20個。而在疫情期間，拉舒福特積極投身慈善活動，還被授予了榮譽博士的學位。

MAN UTD DETERMINED NOT TO BE BULLIED INTO SANCHO DEAL

Manchester United are determined not to be bullied into a deal for Borussia Dortmund winger Jadon Sancho.

United see the German club's €120m (£108m) valuation for the player under the current coronavirus conditions as "unrealistic" for a player who Dortmund themselves signed for £7.2m three years ago. United are also unwilling to break their wage structure for the 20-year-old following the unsuccessful transfer of Alexis Sanchez.

Sancho trained with his Borussia Dortmund team-mates, including Jude Bellingham, on Monday.

A fee between United and Dortmund and personal terms with the player are all yet to be agreed.

Sancho remains United's number one target this summer, but the club have alternate targets in that position if a deal for the England international fails to materialise. Sky in Germany say Borussia Dortmund's stance remains unchanged - there is no interest at all to negotiate on the price.
